query: Our email open rates dropped from 42% to 18% in the last 6 weeks on our weekly newsletter flow.
expected_behavior: Identifies flow decay as the likely cause and references cohort vs. blended open rate analysis
Recommends a deliverability audit (segment overlap, suppression hygiene) before a content rewrite
Does not immediately recommend rewriting the email content as the first fix
Proposes a specific test: isolate the cohort that degraded and compare send behavior
Outputs an action plan with explicit steps and a verification threshold
